shadow.field:
// ===== 完整无错版 =====
if (typeof okazz === 'undefined') {
 okazz = {
 circles: [],
 motions: [],
 colors: ['#fdfffc', '#235789', '#c1292e', '#f1d302', '#020100'],
 noiseData: null,
 width: 300,
 height: 300,
 frame: 0
 };
 
 // 生成圆圈
 for(let i = 0; i < 15; i++) {
 let attempts = 0;
 let circle;
 do {
 let d = 30 + Math.random() * 25;
 let x = 50 + Math.random() * 200;
 let y = 50 + Math.random() * 200;
 circle = {x, y, d};
 attempts++;
 } while (attempts < 10 && okazz.circles.some(c => 
 Math.hypot(circle.x - c.x, circle.y - c.y) < (circle.d/2 + c.d/2)
 ));
 if(attempts < 10) okazz.circles.push(circle);
 }
 
 // 创建Motion（修复作用域）
 okazz.motions = okazz.circles.map(c => ({
 x: c.x, y: c.y, d: c.d,
 t: 0, te: Math.floor(Math.random() * 150 + 150),
 n: Math.floor(Math.random() * 8 + 4),
 circles: [],
 cols: [...okazz.colors].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5),
 count: 0
 }));
 
 // 初始化每个motion的circles
 okazz.motions.forEach(motion => {
 for(let i = 0; i < motion.n; i++) {
 motion.circles.push({
 x0: (Math.random()-0.5) * motion.d * 0.4,
 y0: (Math.random()-0.5) * motion.d * 0.4,
 x1: 0, y1: 0,
 d1: motion.d * 0.8,
 t: -((motion.te / motion.n) * i),
 t1: motion.te,
 col: motion.cols[i % motion.cols.length],
 isDead: false
 });
 }
 });
}

const canvasTex = puzzles.canvasTextures['motion_canvas'];
if(!canvasTex?.image) return;

const ctx = canvasTex.image.getContext("2d");
const md = okazz;
md.frame++;

// 白色背景
ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
ctx.fillRect(0, 0, md.width, md.height);

// 更新并绘制motions
md.motions.forEach(motion => {
 // 更新circles
 for(let i = motion.circles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 let circ = motion.circles[i];
 
 // 动画逻辑
 if(circ.t > 0 && circ.t < circ.t1) {
 let n = circ.t / circ.t1;
 let eased = Math.sqrt(1 - Math.pow(1 - n, 2));
 
 let currD = circ.d1 * eased;
 let currX = circ.x0 + (circ.x1 - circ.x0) * eased;
 let currY = circ.y0 + (circ.y1 - circ.y0) * eased;
 
 // 绘制
 ctx.fillStyle = circ.col;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.arc(motion.x + currX, motion.y + currY, currD/2, 0, Math.PI*2);
 ctx.fill();
 }
 
 circ.t++;
 if(circ.t > circ.t1) {
 // 重生
 motion.count++;
 motion.circles[i] = {
 x0: (Math.random()-0.5) * motion.d * 0.4,
 y0: (Math.random()-0.5) * motion.d * 0.4,
 x1: 0, y1: 0,
 d1: motion.d * 0.8,
 t: 0,
 t1: motion.te,
 col: motion.cols[motion.count % motion.cols.length],
 isDead: false
 };
 }
 }
});

// 简单噪点
ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'soft-light';
for(let i = 0; i < 500; i++) {
 ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(0,0,0,${Math.random()*0.1})`;
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.arc(Math.random()*300, Math.random()*300, Math.random()*2, 0, Math.PI*2);
 ctx.fill();
}
ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';

// 强制刷新
canvasTex.needsUpdate = true;
